blended.narrative: Whitewater is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,078 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
